title: Add Careers section above footer

requirements.text: Create a Careers section component positioned above the footer in the main page layout with company culture introduction including 'Join Our Team' headline and a brief paragraph about innovation, creativity, and performance-driven environment

quotes: Short intro about company culture and growth opportunities
Brief paragraph about innovation, creativity, and performance-driven environment

acceptanceCriteria: Careers section appears above the Footer component in App.tsx
Section includes 'Join Our Team' as the main heading
Contains introductory paragraph about company culture and growth opportunities
Describes innovation, creativity, and performance-driven environment
Follows the existing black, golden yellow, and white color scheme

requirements.text: Display 3-5 job listings in the Careers section with example positions: Digital Marketing Specialist, Paid Ads Manager, Social Media Strategist, Web Designer/Developer, and Sales & Client Success Manager

quotes: List 3–5 example positions such as: Digital Marketing Specialist, Paid Ads Manager, Social Media Strategist, Web Designer / Developer, Sales & Client Success Manager

acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 job listings are displayed
Includes Digital Marketing Specialist position
Includes Paid Ads Manager position
Includes Social Media Strategist position
Includes Web Designer/Developer position
Includes Sales & Client Success Manager position
Job listings are displayed in a grid or card layout

requirements.text: Each job listing must display job title, short description, location (Remote/On-site), and an 'Apply Now' button with golden yellow accent styling consistent with the site theme

quotes: Each job listing should include: Job title, Short description, Location (Remote / On-site), "Apply Now" button

acceptanceCriteria: Each job card displays the job title prominently
Each job card includes a short description of the role
Each job card shows location information (Remote or On-site)
Each job card has an 'Apply Now' button
Apply Now buttons use golden yellow accent color matching ContactForm submit button styling
Job cards have hover effects consistent with existing Portfolio and Services sections

requirements.text: Implement fade-in animations for the Careers section using IntersectionObserver pattern consistent with existing About, Services, and Portfolio components
acceptanceCriteria: Careers section uses IntersectionObserver for animation triggering
Section content fades in when scrolled into view
Animation timing and easing match existing sections
Job cards can have staggered fade-in effect similar to Portfolio cards

requirements.text: Update Navigation component to include 'Careers' link that smoothly scrolls to the new Careers section
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation component includes 'Careers' link in both desktop and mobile menus
Careers link is positioned before Contact link
Clicking Careers link smoothly scrolls to Careers section
Mobile menu closes after clicking Careers link
Navigation link order remains: About, Services, Portfolio, Careers, Contact

constraints: Position Careers section above Footer in App.tsx component hierarchy
Use existing black, golden yellow, and white color palette defined in index.css
Follow IntersectionObserver animation pattern used in About, Services, and Portfolio components
Maintain responsive design principles consistent with existing sections
Use Lucide React icons consistent with other sections
Apply hover effects similar to existing Services and Portfolio cards
nonGoals: Actual job application form submission functionality
Admin panel for managing job postings
